description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of stone and white exterior finishes. The front facade features large rectangular windows, a double garage with three parking spaces, and a paved driveway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio and a fenced backyard with green landscaping and a small garden area. The side view reveals a secondary driveway and additional access to the backyard, as well as more windows for natural light. The house has a clean, geometric design with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and open living spaces. The overall structure is robust, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, stone and white finishes, and both front and rear driveways. Features include a double garage, spacious patio, and fenced backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, double garage with three cars, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary driveway, side entrance, and access to the backyard with visible patio and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area, and large glass doors leading outside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows, secondary driveway, and a clear view of the house's geometric shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, direct access from paved driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
